title: FAQ 9 - What Happens if You Ignore CRA Payroll Debt
ocr_text:
THE TAX & MONEY SHOW
Tuesdays at 9PM Eastern Time
LIVE ON: FreedomReport.ca
Question #9
What happens if I ignore CRA payroll debt?
• How long before they escalate collections?
• Can they revoke my ability to operate (e.g., cancel GST/HST number, freeze payroll accounts)?
